summary: Completed static verification of Spanish Vosk model integration. All requirements fulfilled - Spanish model exists in correct location and code properly implements Spanish speech recognition with English translation/TTS. Previous missing model issue has been resolved.

environment_limitations.issue: No Android SDK/emulator available in container environment
environment_limitations.impact: Cannot perform runtime testing of actual speech recognition or app compilation
environment_limitations.workaround: Comprehensive static code analysis and asset verification performed

passed_tests: ✅ Spanish Vosk model exists at /app/app/src/main/assets/model-es/ with complete file structure
✅ Spanish model README confirms it's 'Small Spanish model for Vosk' with WER benchmarks
✅ Model files present: am/final.mdl, conf/, graph/, ivector/ directories with all required files
✅ Constants correctly define SPANISH_MODEL_ASSET_PATH='model-es' and SPANISH_MODEL_STORAGE_DIR='model-es'
✅ initVoskModels() calls unpackSpeechModel() for Spanish model with correct parameters
✅ startListening() method uses spanishVoskModel when currentListeningLanguage == 'es' (line 263)
✅ Spanish model unpacking stores result in spanishVoskModel variable (line 236)
✅ spanishEnglishTranslator properly configured for Spanish→English translation (lines 129-133)
✅ TTS configured with Spanish locale support (line 394: 'es' → Locale('es'))
✅ Error handling for missing Spanish model with localized messages (lines 244-247)
✅ areSpeechModelsReady() requires both English and Spanish models to be non-null (line 251)
success_percentage: Static verification: 100% (all 3 requirements met - model exists, code uses Spanish model correctly, translation flow complete)
